MI450 Q3 ramp. Position = ~10.3% equity (OVER 5% hard cap). OPERATOR: (1) SELL 9sh at market NOW; (2) GTC stop $481.42 + GTC target $607 on remaining 9sh. API BLOCKED — agent cannot execute.

RE-SCORED 6.5 (was 7.5). REJECTED. DRAM antitrust class-action (Samsung/SK Hynix/Micron, June 25 filing) + MU -6.5% today ($1,154 → $1,058) on H2 profit-taking. Fundamentals intact (HBM4 sold out) but antitrust overhang reduces conviction. Wait for technical stabilization before re-entry. NOT ENTERING.
